title: Background Jobs & Async Processing for Next.js
description: Add reliable background job processing to a Next.js app: Inngest for event-driven jobs, Redis for rate limiting and caching, error monitoring, and production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Drizzle ORM for the database (job state and user data)
Add authentication so jobs can run in the context of a real user
Add Inngest for event-driven background jobs with retries and observability
Add Upstash Redis for rate limiting job triggers and caching results
Add Sentry for error monitoring on failing background jobs
Configure CI to run tests on every push before deploying
Deploy to Vercel — Inngest works with serverless functions
